what_it_does: Records metadata for a design-assets channel image named 'Vi' (an icon), including its blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, authorship, and timestamps.
observations: This is a ledger/metadata file, not the image itself.
The image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being a PNG.
The image source is listed as 'dragnet'.
Version 1 is the only version and has an empty alt text.
No links or cross-references are present.
standouts: Dimensions are 0x0 for a PNG asset.
Alt text is empty in the version record.
conventions: YAML front matter in a Markdown file for structured asset metadata.
Uses blob:// and image:// URI schemes for content addressing.
Versioned asset record with a versions array.
concerns: Zero width and height may indicate missing or failed image analysis.
Empty alt text reduces accessibility metadata.
No links or provenance beyond 'dragnet' and session id.
notes: A single-version, PNG icon asset ledger entry with placeholder-like dimensions and no descriptive alt text.
questions: Why are the width and height zero?
What does 'dragnet' refer to as a source?
Is the empty alt text intentional or incomplete?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog an icon asset; it does record the asset but with zero dimensions and no alt text, so the catalog entry is incomplete.
intention_signals: To register a design-assets icon named 'Vi' in a versioned, content-addressed ledger for later retrieval and reference.
contribution: Provides a stable metadata record and blob reference for the 'Vi' icon asset, enabling retrieval and versioning within the design-assets channel.
summary_for_embedding: Markdown metadata ledger entry for a design-assets PNG icon named 'Vi' with blob reference, zero dimensions, version 1, and empty alt text.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a design-assets icon asset for content-addressed retrieval.
